approaches.title: Group by fixed-length character frequency signature
approaches.summary: Uses a 26-element character-count array as the hash-map key, placing each string into the bucket shared by its anagrams. Later revisions simplify result сборage

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial implementation using an explicit loop to collect the hash-map values.
Replaces the manual result-building loop with map.into_values().collect().
Refactors the input-processing loop into a functional fold while preserving the same frequency-signature strategy.
